topics.title: BBC Acquires Kabul Drama Series Starring Late Eric Dane
topics.angle: The BBC has acquired 'Kabul,' a drama series set during the Afghanistan withdrawal, notably one of the final projects for the late Eric Dane.

sources.headline: BBC Buys Kabul Drama Series About American Withdrawal From Afghanistan Starring The Late Eric Dane
sources.summary: The BBC has acquired the upcoming series Kabul set against the backdrop of the terrifying real-life events in Afghanistan from 2021, one of the last shows to star the late Eric Dane. The Mediawan drama for the European Alliance of broadcasters kicks off as American troops withdraw from Kabul and the Taliban enters the city. [ ]
